news.title:
IFC plans to increase India investments by 30% to $7B this fiscal.
The focus will be on boosting local initiatives and creating jobs.
news.summary:
IFC plans to increase India investments by 30% to $7B this fiscal.
The focus will be on boosting local initiatives and creating jobs.

news.title:
Union of India filed SFIO petition at NCLT involving IFCI Ltd over FY17 loans, investments.
Net book value of implicated loans is Rs. 157.3 crore as of Dec 2025; provisions resolved.
news.summary:
Union of India filed SFIO petition at NCLT involving IFCI Ltd over FY17 loans, investments.
Net book value of implicated loans is Rs. 157.3 crore as of Dec 2025; provisions resolved.

news.title:
SFIO initiates probe into alleged large-scale corporate misconduct at IFCI.
Regulators are examining potential wrongdoing and compliance lapses in entities.
news.summary:
SFIO initiates probe into alleged large-scale corporate misconduct at IFCI.
Regulators are examining potential wrongdoing and compliance lapses in entities.

news.title:
IFCI shares surged 11% as NSE's IPO plans progress, boosting optimism due to IFCI's indirect exposure via SHCIL's 4.4% NSE stake.
NSE IPO aims to sell 4-4.5% shares, with top banks selected for advisory roles. Potential landmark event for India's capital markets.
news.summary:
IFCI shares surged 11% as NSE's IPO plans progress, boosting optimism due to IFCI's indirect exposure via SHCIL's 4.4% NSE stake.
NSE IPO aims to sell 4-4.5% shares, with top banks selected for advisory roles. Potential landmark event for India's capital markets.

news.title: NSE board approves IPO for IFCI, aiding its capital raising plans.
news.summary: NSE board approves IPO for IFCI, aiding its capital raising plans.

news.title:
IFCI shares surged 9% to Rs 60.08 after NSE received NOC for IPO.
IFCI benefits through its 52% stake in SHCIL, holding 4.4% in NSE.
news.summary:
IFCI shares surged 9% to Rs 60.08 after NSE received NOC for IPO.
IFCI benefits through its 52% stake in SHCIL, holding 4.4% in NSE.

news.title:
IFCI posts Q3 net profit of 2.08B INR vs loss of 87M YoY.
Q3 revenue slightly dips to 4.56B INR from 4.57B YoY.
news.summary:
IFCI posts Q3 net profit of 2.08B INR vs loss of 87M YoY.
Q3 revenue slightly dips to 4.56B INR from 4.57B YoY.

news.title:
IFCI approved Q3 unaudited results and received Rs. 500 Cr from Gal shares in Feb 2025.
Govt approved group consolidation merger; gross NPA remains high at Rs. 3,700 Cr (96.3%).
news.summary:
IFCI approved Q3 unaudited results and received Rs. 500 Cr from Gal shares in Feb 2025.
Govt approved group consolidation merger; gross NPA remains high at Rs. 3,700 Cr (96.3%).

news.title:
IFCI Ltd. fell 7.15%, closing at Rs.56.35 on Jan 23, 2026.
It underperformed Sensex, which declined 3.31% amid volatile conditions.
news.summary:
IFCI Ltd. fell 7.15%, closing at Rs.56.35 on Jan 23, 2026.
It underperformed Sensex, which declined 3.31% amid volatile conditions.

news.title:
IFCI Ltd received inquiry on unusual share price changes; no new events reported.
Company confirmed to stock exchange; no identified cause for price fluctuations.
news.summary:
IFCI Ltd received inquiry on unusual share price changes; no new events reported.
Company confirmed to stock exchange; no identified cause for price fluctuations.

news.title:
IFCI Ltd observes significant rise in trading volume of its shares.
The company confirms no undisclosed info or events causing the rise.
news.summary:
IFCI Ltd observes significant rise in trading volume of its shares.
The company confirms no undisclosed info or events causing the rise.

news.title:
IFCI shares hit a two-month high on NSE IPO hopes; rose 5.6% to Rs 59.60.
IFCI benefits from SHCIL's NSE stake, boosting financial flexibility; 12.5% rise in 12 months.
news.summary:
IFCI shares hit a two-month high on NSE IPO hopes; rose 5.6% to Rs 59.60.
IFCI benefits from SHCIL's NSE stake, boosting financial flexibility; 12.5% rise in 12 months.

news.title:
IFCI Ltd. surged 7.1% on 12 Jan 2026, hitting Rs 52.8 intraday.
The rise occurred despite Sensex declining 0.5% during the session.
news.summary:
IFCI Ltd. surged 7.1% on 12 Jan 2026, hitting Rs 52.8 intraday.
The rise occurred despite Sensex declining 0.5% during the session.

news.title:
IFCI Ltd received an Income Tax order raising an additional demand of Rs.13.6 Cr due to reduced brought forward losses.
The company has sufficient MAT credit to offset the demand, ensuring no financial or operational impact.
news.summary:
IFCI Ltd received an Income Tax order raising an additional demand of Rs.13.6 Cr due to reduced brought forward losses.
The company has sufficient MAT credit to offset the demand, ensuring no financial or operational impact.

news.title:
IFCI appoints Chirag Sapra as CFO from Nov 11, 2025, replacing Suneet Shukla.
Sapra, a CA and MBA from FMS Delhi, has 18 years of experience.
news.summary:
IFCI appoints Chirag Sapra as CFO from Nov 11, 2025, replacing Suneet Shukla.
Sapra, a CA and MBA from FMS Delhi, has 18 years of experience.

news.title:
IFCI's Q2 net profit rose to ₹3.2B, up from ₹1.85B YOY.
Revenue grew to ₹7.3B in Q2, compared to ₹6.2B YOY.
news.summary:
IFCI's Q2 net profit rose to ₹3.2B, up from ₹1.85B YOY.
Revenue grew to ₹7.3B in Q2, compared to ₹6.2B YOY.

news.title:
Brickwork Ratings reaffirmed IFCI Ltd's debt ratings: BWR B with Negative Outlook for NCDs and BWR A4 for proposed CPs.
Ratings are valid till Nov 4, 2026; information shared by Priyanka Sharma, Company Secretary of IFCI Ltd.
news.summary:
Brickwork Ratings reaffirmed IFCI Ltd's debt ratings: BWR B with Negative Outlook for NCDs and BWR A4 for proposed CPs.
Ratings are valid till Nov 4, 2026; information shared by Priyanka Sharma, Company Secretary of IFCI Ltd.

news.title:
IFCI Ltd confirms payment of annual interest on 10.75% unsecured NCDs due 31 Oct 2025.
Interest of ₹1.01 crore paid; ISIN: INE039A09NWO. Details comply with SEBI Master Circular dated July 2025.
news.summary:
IFCI Ltd confirms payment of annual interest on 10.75% unsecured NCDs due 31 Oct 2025.
Interest of ₹1.01 crore paid; ISIN: INE039A09NWO. Details comply with SEBI Master Circular dated July 2025.
